name: xsquared
description: OpenClaw plugin for creating, reviewing, and publishing high-quality X posts with Birdclaw.

scripts.dashboard: npm run build --silent && node dist/xsquared.js dashboard
scripts.trends: npm run build --silent && node dist/xsquared.js trends
scripts.generate: npm run build --silent && node dist/xsquared.js generate
scripts.strategy: npm run build --silent && node dist/xsquared.js strategy
scripts.list: npm run build --silent && node dist/xsquared.js list
scripts.check: npm run build --silent && node dist/xsquared.js doctor
